Task.title: Task
Task.description: A task in the TaskFlow application.

description.description: A detailed description of the task.

dueDate.description: The due date of the task in ISO format.

status.description: The current status of the task.

blockedBy.description: The ID of another task that blocks this one.

updatedAt.description: When the task was last updated.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns the task.

order.description: The order of the task in the list.

/tasks/{taskId}.description: A collection of tasks belonging to users.
